pr.title: Fix gmtitle to match, mark as matching, ninja apply
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Made `src/melee/gm/gmtitle.c` matching by a small control-flow/refactoring change, updated GALE01 symbol metadata for gmtitle-related local data/BSS splits, and changed `configure.py` to build `melee/gm/gmtitle.c` as `Matching` instead of `Equivalent`. The decomp.dev bot reported 2 new matches for `main/melee/gm/gmtitle`: `.bss` improved from 50.00% to 100.00% and `.sdata2` from 87.50% to 100.00%.
what_changed: Added `static inline bool isActiveTitle()` in `gmtitle.c` to isolate the title/opening-movie mode condition that returns false for `MJ_TITLE` or for `MJ_OPENING_MV` with `MN_VS`.
Changed `fn_801A1498_inline` from `static inline void` to `static void` and replaced a local `bool var_r0` conditional block with `if (isActiveTitle() != 0)` before selecting the animation frame.
Converted many gmtitle-adjacent symbols in `config/GALE01/symbols.txt` from generic `lbl_...` or global `gmTitle_...` entries into local `@NNN` symbols with explicit `scope:local` metadata.

Split `gmTitle_80479B28` BSS from one global 0xA0 object into a 0x10 global object plus local BSS symbols at `gmTitle_80479B38` size 0x10 and `gmTitle_80479B48` size 0x80, with an added local `...bss.0` label.
smart_moves: The matching fix was minimal: it avoided broad semantic rewrites and instead reshaped the compiler-visible control flow by extracting the mode check into a helper.
Preserved the original condition and observable behavior while changing how the compiler likely emitted the boolean path used before `HSD_JObjReqAnimAll`.
Updated symbol-map locality and object boundaries together with the source change, which helped the object move from equivalent to fully matching instead of leaving data sections partially unmatched.
Used the build configuration state (`Equivalent` to `Matching`) as the final proof point only after source and symbol metadata were adjusted.
decomp_lessons: For small matching gaps, extracting a repeated or awkward condition into a `static inline bool` helper can alter codegen enough to match without changing behavior.
A file may remain only equivalent because of data/BSS symbol boundaries or symbol scope, not just because of function codegen.

When data in a TU becomes matching, revisit symbol-map entries: local compiler labels such as `@156`, `@173`, or `...bss.0` may be more accurate than exported-looking `gmTitle_...` or generic `lbl_...` names.
Splitting an oversized BSS object into the actual global portion plus adjacent locals can recover section matching.
After proving a TU is fully matching, remember to update `configure.py` from `Equivalent` to `Matching` so build/reporting status reflects the new state.
naming_conventions: Use `gmTitle_` prefix for known global title-screen objects that are intentionally exposed in the symbol map.
Use local `@NNN` labels in `symbols.txt` for compiler-local strings and constants instead of preserving generic `lbl_...` names or incorrectly global `gmTitle_...` names.
Use section-local synthetic labels such as `...data.0` and `...bss.0` when needed to describe local labels at section/object boundaries.
The helper name `isActiveTitle` is descriptive for the extracted title-state predicate, but the PR provides no review discussion confirming it as a broader naming convention.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Extracted a compound condition into `static inline bool isActiveTitle()` and called it from `fn_801A1498_inline` to influence generated control flow.
Changed `fn_801A1498_inline` from inline to non-inline, likely to match the original function layout/codegen.
Replaced an explicit temporary `bool var_r0` assignment block with a direct helper call in the branch condition.
Adjusted symbol scopes from global/generic labels to local `@NNN` symbols across `.rodata`, `.data`, `.sdata`, and `.sdata2`.
Corrected BSS object sizing by splitting `gmTitle_80479B28` from size 0xA0 into size 0x10 plus neighboring local objects.
review_feedback: No human review comments were present in the provided slice.
decomp.dev bot reported GALE01 progress: linked code +3936 bytes, matched data +192 bytes, linked data +584 bytes.
decomp.dev bot reported 2 new matches for `main/melee/gm/gmtitle`: `.bss` 50.00% to 100.00% and `.sdata2` 87.50% to 100.00%.
follow_up_queries: Find other PRs that changed an object from Equivalent to Matching in configure.py after only small control-flow helper extraction.
Search for BSS object splits in symbols.txt where one oversized global was replaced by a smaller global plus local symbols.
Search for gmtitle follow-up PRs involving `gmTitle_80479B38`, `gmTitle_80479B48`, or `isActiveTitle`.
Find other PRs where local `@NNN` symbol scope changes caused `.sdata2` or `.bss` to become 100% matched.
